data.analysis:
**Specific Error:** `Unresolved reference: ComponentName`

**File/Line:** `app/src/main/java/com/example/myandroid/MyDeviceAdminReceiver.kt:25:21`

**Brief Summary:** The build failed during the `compileReleaseKotlin` task because the Kotlin compiler cannot find the `ComponentName` class. This is typically caused by a missing import statement (e.g., `import android.content.ComponentName`) in the specified Kotlin file.

ops.text: Fix compilation error: Add missing ComponentName import in MyDeviceAdminReceiver

ops.text: Update Cortex dashboard with Launcher and Work Profile commands
Add PROFILE_PROVISIONING_COMPLETE intent filter to MyDeviceAdminReceiver

ops.find_block:
<receiver
            android:name=".MyDeviceAdminReceiver"
            android:description="@string/admin_desc"
            android:label="My Android Admin"
            android:exported="true"
            android:permission="android.permission.BIND_DEVICE_ADMIN">
            <meta-data
                android:name="android.app.device_admin"
                android:resource="@xml/device_admin_policies" />
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.app.action.DEVICE_ADMIN_ENABLED" />
            </intent-filter>
        </receiver>
ops.replace_with:
<receiver
            android:name=".MyDeviceAdminReceiver"
            android:description="@string/admin_desc"
            android:label="My Android Admin"
            android:exported="true"
            android:permission="android.permission.BIND_DEVICE_ADMIN">
            <meta-data
                android:name="android.app.device_admin"
                android:resource="@xml/device_admin_policies" />
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.app.action.DEVICE_ADMIN_ENABLED" />
                <action android:name="android.app.action.PROFILE_PROVISIONING_COMPLETE" />
            </intent-filter>
        </receiver>
